UPDATE si_items SET table_id = NULL WHERE table_id = :table

-- Note: we have two sets of tables: "blue" and "green". At any time one of them is the
-- active table that we insert new embeddings in. The other table contains embeddings
-- that can still be queried, but are to be migrated into the active table. Since the two 
-- tables can have different vector spaces this can only happen by re-indexing the original
-- data. 
-- Additionaly to the two tables we can also have "orphaned" items in the si_items table. Those
-- are items that were not migrated

ALTER TABLE si_diskann_config ADD graph_connectivity_check_threshold REAL;
UPDATE si_diskann_config SET graph_connectivity_check_threshold = 0.01;

-- adding two new columns, but add them in the between current columns not at the end.

CREATE TABLE si_diskann_info_new (
    table_id INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    dimension INTEGER,
    vector_space_id BLOB(16),
    element_type INTEGER,
    content_type INTEGER,
    quantization_scale REAL NULL,
    quantization_zero_point REAL NULL,
    start_node_id INTEGER NULL ,
    last_id_processed_in_consolidation INTEGER NULL,
    final_id_to_process_in_consolidation INTEGER NULL,
    pruned_nod

-- all vector spaces with uint8_t element_type should have quantization parameters and it may not be NULL
UPDATE si_diskann_info SET quantization_scale = 1.0, quantization_zero_point = 0.0 WHERE element_type = 0;

CREATE TABLE si_application_values(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT);
